new_value: Implemented OSCORE is_protected check, peer EUI64 extraction, ctx lookup via oscore_ctx_get_by_eui64, coap_oscore_unprotect_request with orig_code validation, fail-closed UNAUTHORIZED/BAD_REQUEST/NOT_ALLOWED in msg_inbox_post (lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/coap_server.c:312). Payload handling updated per deaddrop_post pattern. Added required include. Commit cd6b1dcc5. Tests via coap_keys/oscore native_sim verified indirectly.
